turns.reference_transcript: She had your dark suit in greasy wash water all year.
turns.orthographic_transcript: She had your dark suit in greasy wash water all year.
turns.phonetic_transcript: h# sh iy hv ae dcl jh axr dcl d aa r kcl k s ux dx ih n gcl g r iy z iy w aa sh w ao dx axr q ao l y ih axr h#
turns.raw_transcript: She had your dark suit in greasy wash water all year.

turns.reference_transcript: Don't ask me to carry an oily rag like that.
turns.orthographic_transcript: Don't ask me to carry an oily rag like that.

turns.reference_transcript: Poets, moreover, dwell on human passions.

turns.raw_transcript: Poets, moreover, dwell on human passions.

turns.reference_transcript: It was not exactly panic they gave way to, but they could not just sit there.

turns.raw_transcript: It was not exactly panic they gave way to, but they could not just sit there.

turns.reference_transcript: We can die, too, we can die like real people.
